title: CA project in a Very-High FHSZ with no ignition-resistant deck/vent spec
notes: Tests WUI gating: rules apply only when wui_zone is set, then fail when the spec is absent.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS
Occupancy B, Type V-B, 1 story, 20 ft, 4,000 sf, sprinklered.
NFPA 13 sprinkler. NFPA 72 alarm. Accessible parking, route, restroom, braille.
IECC energy. IMC 403 ventilation. Panic hardware. 400A service. CALGreen low-flow. Construction waste management plan. Standard vent and wood deck details on A-4.0.
